name: Ryan Garcia
about: 3 years in elevated athleisure at Lululemon and Alo Yoga. Fitness background and product passion. New to Reflex but strong retail fundamentals.
interviewTranscript: I used to work for Adidas and I loved being surrounded by people who share my passion for fitness and fashion. At Lululemon, I learned how important it is to really understand the product—the technical fabrics, the fit, the lifestyle. Customers in athleisure are educated and they expect you to know your stuff. I'm new to Reflex but I have strong fundamentals and I'm ready to bring that expertise to new environments.
